mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.notice_id, c.user_id, c.content, c.create_time, c.update_time, c.status, c.parent_id, u.username, u.img as user_avatar, w.title as notice_title FROM comment c LEFT JOIN sysuser u ON c.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN webnotice w ON c.notice_id = w.id WHERE c.id = #{id}

SELECT c.id, c.notice_id, c.user_id, c.content, c.create_time, c.update_time, c.status, c.parent_id, u.username, u.img as user_avatar FROM comment c LEFT JOIN sysuser u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.notice_id = #{noticeId} AND c.status = '1' ORDER BY c.create_time DESC

SELECT c.id, c.notice_id, c.user_id, c.content, c.create_time, c.update_time, c.status, c.parent_id, w.title as notice_title FROM comment c LEFT JOIN webnotice w ON c.notice_id = w.id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} AND c.status = '1' ORDER BY c.create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment WHERE notice_id = #{noticeId} AND status = '1'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comment(notice_id, user_id, content, create_time, update_time, status, parent_id) VALUES (#{noticeId}, #{userId}, #{content}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{status}, #{parentId})

INSERT INTO comment(notice_id, user_id, content, create_time, update_time, status, parent_id) VALUES
(#{entity.noticeId}, #{entity.userId}, #{entity.content}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime}, #{entity.status}, #{entity.parentId})

INSERT INTO comment(notice_id, user_id, content, create_time, update_time, status, parent_id) VALUES
(#{entity.noticeId}, #{entity.userId}, #{entity.content}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime}, #{entity.status}, #{entity.parentId})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE content = VALUES(content), update_time = VALUES(update_time), status = VALUES(status)
mapper.update:
UPDATE comment
notice_id = #{noticeId},
user_id = #{userId},
content = #{content},
create_time = #{createTime},
update_time = #{updateTime},
status = #{status},
parent_id = #{parentId},
WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE comment SET status = '0', update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.notice_id, c.user_id, c.content, c.create_time, c.update_time, c.status, c.parent_id, u.username, u.img as user_avatar FROM comment c LEFT JOIN sysuser u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.notice_id = #{noticeId} AND c.status = '1' AND (c.parent_id IS NULL OR c.parent_id = 0) ORDER BY c.create_time DESC

SELECT c.id, c.notice_id, c.user_id, c.content, c.create_time, c.update_time, c.status, c.parent_id, u.username, u.img as user_avatar, CASE WHEN parent_u.username IS NOT NULL AND parent_u.username != '' THEN parent_u.username ELSE '原评论者' END as reply_to_user FROM comment c LEFT JOIN sysuser u ON c.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN comment parent_comment ON c.parent_id = parent_comment.id LEFT JOIN sysuser parent_u ON parent_comment.user_id = parent_u.id WHERE c.parent_id = #{parentId} AND c.status = '1' ORDER BY c.create_time ASC

SELECT c.id, c.notice_id, c.user_id, c.content, c.create_time, c.update_time, c.status, c.parent_id, u.username, u.img as user_avatar, CASE WHEN parent_u.username IS NOT NULL AND parent_u.username != '' THEN parent_u.username ELSE '原评论者' END as reply_to_user FROM comment c LEFT JOIN sysuser u ON c.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN comment parent_comment ON c.parent_id = parent_comment.id LEFT JOIN sysuser parent_u ON parent_comment.user_id = parent_u.id WHERE c.parent_id = #{parentId} AND c.status = '1' ORDER BY c.create_time ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND status = '1'

WITH RECURSIVE comment_tree AS ( -- 基础查询：直接回复 SELECT c.id, c.notice_id, c.user_id, c.content, c.create_time, c.update_time, c.status, c.parent_id, u.username, u.img as user_avatar, parent_u.username as parent_username, 1 as level FROM comment c LEFT JOIN sysuser u ON c.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN sysuser parent_u ON ( SELECT parent_c.user_id FROM comment parent_c WHERE parent_c.id = c.parent_id ) = parent_u.id WHERE c.parent_id = #{parentId} AND c.status = '1'
UNION ALL
-- 递归查询：多级回复 SELECT c.id, c.notice_id, c.user_id, c.content, c.create_time, c.update_time, c.status, c.parent_id, u.username, u.img as user_avatar, parent_u.username as parent_username, ct.level + 1 as level FROM comment c INNER JOIN comment_tree ct ON c.parent_id = ct.id LEFT JOIN sysuser u ON c.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN sysuser parent_u ON parent_u.id = ct.user_id WHERE c.status = '1' ) SELECT id, notice_id, user_id, content, create_time, update_time, status, parent_id, username, user_avatar, CASE WHEN parent_username IS NOT NULL AND parent_username != '' THEN parent_username ELSE '原评论者' END as reply_to_user, level FROM comment_tree ORDER BY create_time ASC

SELECT c.id, c.notice_id, c.user_id, c.content, c.create_time, c.update_time, c.status, c.parent_id, u.username, u.img as user_avatar, CASE WHEN parent_u.username IS NOT NULL AND parent_u.username != '' THEN parent_u.username ELSE '原评论者' END as reply_to_user FROM comment c LEFT JOIN sysuser u ON c.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN comment parent_comment ON c.parent_id = parent_comment.id LEFT JOIN sysuser parent_u ON parent_comment.user_id = parent_u.id WHERE c.status = '1' AND ( c.parent_id = #{parentId} OR FIND_IN_SET(c.parent_id, ( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(id SEPARATOR ',') FROM ( SELECT id FROM comment WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND status = '1' UNION SELECT c2.id FROM comment c2 INNER JOIN comment c1 ON c2.parent_id = c1.id WHERE c1.parent_id = #{parentId} AND c1.status = '1' AND c2.status = '1' ) as child_comments )) ) ORDER BY c.create_time ASC
